# Count all (json payload parse)

**Dataset**: `gx_04_raw_json` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

Parse JSON-in-text payload fields with json_extract_scalar / json_extract_array. Count all.

```sql
dataset = gx_04_raw_json | comp count() as n
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 1). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
